# Anarchy, State, and Utopia

*[Nozick](../philosophers/nozick.md) · 1974*

The libertarian reply to Rawls. Nozick defends the minimal state and an entitlement theory of justice: a distribution is just if it results from legitimate acquisitions and transfers, whatever overall pattern it forms. It is here that he sets 'liberty upsets patterns' against any outcome-based justice.
